description:
Measure Tor Browser's viewport dimensions at https://check.torproject.org/ while the letterboxing privacy feature is enabled. Disable the 'privacy.resistFingerprinting.letterboxing' preference in about:config and re-measure the dimensions at the same URL. Record the results in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/letterboxing_audit.txt using the following format:

Letterboxed Width: [X]
Letterboxed Height: [Y]
Unconstrained Width: [A]
Unconstrained Height: [B]
